name: I-Morphine sulfate
description: I-opioid analgesic. Inikeza ukukhululeka kobuhlungu okusebenzayo kodwa kubangela i-vasodilation kanye ne-hypotension - sebenzisa ngokuqapha ekushaqekeni okopha. I-Ketamine ikhethwa kuzilungiselelo zokulwa. Sebenzisa i-morphine kuphela ezigulini ezizinzile ngokwe-hemodynamically.
indications: Ubuhlungu obuphakathi kuya kobunzima ezigulini ezizinzile ze-hemodynamically
dose: 2-4 mg IV/IO q4h PRN. Titrate ukuze usebenze. IM: 5-10 mg q4h PRN.
warnings: Idala i-vasodilation -- ingakhuphula ukushaqeka okopha kakhulu. Hlola i-BP ngaphambi nangemuva.

pediatric.dose: 0.05-0.1 mg/kg IV q2-4h PRN. Umthamo owodwa omkhulu we-2mg IV enganeni engena-opioid.
pediatric.note: Gada izinga lokuphefumula eduze. Izingane ezisanda kuzalwa zizwela kakhulu.

obstetric.note: Iwela i-placenta. Ukucindezeleka kokuphefumula kwengane esanda kuzalwa kungenzeka uma kunikezwa phakathi namahora angu-2-4 okubeletha. Yenza i-naloxone ilungele usana.

source: JTS CPG: Acute Pain Management / PHTLS
